LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Medicine.label: Pharmacology
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Medicine.question: In vanilla, which type of medicine has the highest surgery success factor?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Terrain.label: Sanitation
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Terrain.question: Without a medical bed, which terrain is ideal for performing surgery?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Necrosis.label: Pathology
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Necrosis.question: What is the primary purpose of amputating a rotting limb?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Skill.label: Skill Knowledge
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Skill.question: Which skill directly determines the success rate of surgery?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Factors.label: General Awareness
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Factors.question: Which of the following factors does NOT affect surgery success rate?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_BloodLoss.label: Physiology
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_BloodLoss.question: At what blood loss percentage will a colonist die immediately?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Cleanliness.label: Sanitation
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Cleanliness.question: In vanilla, what is the maximum cleanliness bonus provided by sterile tiles?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Immunity.label: Physiology
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Immunity.question: Which body function attribute directly affects the immunity gain speed?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Luciferium.label: Pharmacology
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_Luciferium.question: Which drug, often referred to as "A bargain with the devil," must never be stopped once started, or it results in death?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_FailResult.label: Surgery Practice
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_FailResult.question: In vanilla, if a surgery is determined to be a "Catastrophic Failure," what is the most typical consequence?
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_FailResult.options.0: Removal of incorrect body parts and widespread damage
LanguageData.SurgeryQuiz_FailResult.options.3: Surgeon gains a 'Genius Surgeon' mood buff
